meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve Code Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster, impress clients, and ship production-ready SaaS.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting hours manually tracing stack traces. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for surgical CLI-based debugging, you can automate root-cause analysis. This workflow turns hours of frustrating trial-and-error into minutes of precise, AI-driven remediation, allowing you to maintain velocity and meet aggressive client deadlines consistently.
content.intro:
It is 2:00 AM. The production build is failing, the client is pinging you on Slack, and the stack trace looks like a cryptic riddle from a bygone era. You are stuck in the 'debugging death loop,' where every fix seems to spawn two new, more elusive bugs. As a freelancer, your reputation is built on speed, and this bottleneck is threatening your bottom line.

But the era of manual, line-by-line debugging is over. By treating your codebase as a data structure for AI models to interpret, you can bypass the cognitive load of deep-dive troubleshooting. We are moving from 'fixing code' to 'orchestrating solutions' using advanced AI agents.

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Before debugging, you must provide the AI with a snapshot of your dependency tree and environment variables to avoid 'hallucination-based' fixes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify potential dependency conflicts in package.json. List the top 3 high-risk areas based on recent changes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config set context_window 128k && claude run --init

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Don't ask the AI to 'fix the app.' Ask it to perform a binary search on the codebase to isolate the logic error.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a recursive trace on the failing function. Identify which module is returning the unexpected null value.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Trace the execution path for [function_name] and identify the state mutation that causes the error.'

steps.title: Generate a Unit Test Suite
steps.description: Never apply a fix without a safety net. Generate a test that fails due to the current bug, then ensure it passes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test case that replicates the current production bug. Ensure it covers edge cases for input validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a unit test file for [module_name] that triggers the identified bug'

steps.title: Apply Surgical Refactoring
steps.description: Use AI to write the patch, but enforce strict adherence to your existing architectural patterns to prevent technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified logic using clean code principles. Ensure the solution is idiomatic and maintains backward compatibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'fix the bug in [module_name] following the existing pattern and update the unit test'

steps.title: Automated Regression Audit
steps.description: Verify that your fix didn't break downstream services by running a cross-module impact analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a regression analysis on the entire codebase following the recent fix. List any potential side effects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run all tests and check for regression in the authentication module'

pro_tips: Always use a specific 'System Persona' prompt at the start of your Claude session to enforce architectural constraints.
Use Antigravity to generate a 'Codebase Map' file; providing this to Claude Code drastically reduces hallucination rates.
Force AI to explain the 'Why' behind a fix before applying it to ensure you remain the lead engineer in the loop.
When debugging complex async flows, ask the AI to map the event loop sequence in a Mermaid.js diagram.
Maintain a 'Common Patterns' markdown file in your repo; Claude Code can reference this to keep your code style consistent across projects.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI workflows into your CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automate the debugging process before human intervention is even required.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Master these tools to reclaim your weekends and double your output speed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
